title: Consistent 2D Items
description: Re-textures and reworks some items to either be 2D, or to be more consistent with other 2D items!
body:
Consistent 2D Items it's a simple pack that works to either add or rework a few 2D items in minecraft. All of the said textures can be seen in this image:

![An image showing all the textures that the resource pack changes.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98693b0daa18611814da2a68566e5f853f0589f2.png)

WARNING -> In 1.12.2 the pack losses all the 2D Bed items, and in 1.7.10 it losses the lever and tripwire hook textures. Sorry for the inconvinience!

## Special thanks to
All the friends that I pestered with opinions for the pack >_<
